evals.prompt: Add Maximal and Predacon factions, and add Beast Wars continuity family to the reference data
evals.expected_output: Modified factions.json with 2 new entries (maximal, predacon with franchise_slug: transformers), modified continuity_families.json if beast-era doesn't exist. Correct slug format, updated _metadata.total counts.

evals.prompt: Add the main Beast Wars Season 1 characters — both Maximals and Predacons — with their appearances
evals.expected_output: New beast-era-characters.json with ~12-15 main S1 characters (Optimus Primal, Megatron-BW, Cheetor, Rattrap, Dinobot, Rhinox, etc). New beast-era-appearances.json with matching appearances. Correct FKs, slug format, metadata counts. Validation passes.

evals.prompt: Build out seed data for Beast Era: add all missing reference data, Beast Wars and Beast Machines characters, appearances, and Hasbro Beast Wars items
evals.expected_output: Work plan presented first. Reference data updated (factions, sub-groups). New character file with Beast Wars + Beast Machines characters. New appearance file. New items file under items/hasbro/. Tiered execution with sub-agents. Validation passes.
